connectivity_tips.tip: EURO is the official currency in both Netherlands and Belgium
connectivity_tips._source_file: Netherlands/All Inclusive Guide- Netherlands and Belgium.pdf

connectivity_tips.tip: Most establishments accept cards, but carry cash for small purchases, public restrooms, and supermarket trolleys
connectivity_tips._source_file: Netherlands/All Inclusive Guide- Netherlands and Belgium.pdf

connectivity_tips.tip: Use ATMs for most cost-effective currency exchange, check with your banks regarding charges
connectivity_tips._source_file: Netherlands/All Inclusive Guide- Netherlands and Belgium.pdf

connectivity_tips.tip: Ensure cards are activated for international spends
connectivity_tips._source_file: Netherlands/All Inclusive Guide- Netherlands and Belgium.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Carry light jackets and umbrellas/rain jacket for weather protection
safety_tips._source_file: Netherlands/All Inclusive Guide- Netherlands and Belgium.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Bring travel adaptors that fit socket type E, F and J
safety_tips._source_file: Netherlands/All Inclusive Guide- Netherlands and Belgium.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Carry doctors prescriptions/travel prescriptions for medicines (except over the counter meds)
safety_tips._source_file: Netherlands/All Inclusive Guide- Netherlands and Belgium.pdf

health_tips._source_file: Netherlands/All Inclusive Guide- Netherlands and Belgium.pdf

health_tips.tip: Wear walking shoes for extensive sightseeing
